_engine_options.edge_tts: Free Microsoft neural voices (default). List: edge-tts --list-voices
_engine_options.openai: Set engine to openai, voice_id to nova|alloy|echo|fable|onyx|shimmer, OPENAI_API_KEY in env
_engine_options.sonexlabs: Pāṇini TTS API — any text, not just phone calls. Sign up at sonexlabs.com (10k chars free)
_engine_options.transcript_only: Skip audio; write .txt for ElevenLabs / Murf / SonexLabs re-record

phase_intros.SETUP: Setup phase. The browser opens the landing page or sign-in screen.
phase_intros.EMPLOYER: Employer role. Tech Corporation HR performs employer-side steps.
phase_intros.COLLEGE: College administrator role. IIT Madras performs campus-side steps.
phase_intros.STUDENT: Student role. Arjun Verma performs student-side steps.
phase_intros.SUPER_ADMIN: Super administrator role. Platform settings, email logs, and governance.
